phase_history.notes: Multiband VST3 host plugin. 3 bands, 5 serial VST3 slots per band, dynamic crossovers, 3-tier dry/wet, L/R/M/S routing, linear phase option. Complexity 5/5.

Complexity 5/5. 6-phase implementation: hosting infrastructure, crossover, plugin chains, M/S routing, linear phase, WebView UI. 73 automatable parameters. Linkwitz-Riley crossover with dynamic ranges. JUCE HostPluginDemo as reference.

1400x800 WebView UI. FabFilter-inspired light theme. 3 column layout (Low/Mid/High), collapsible spectrum analyzer with draggable crossover handles, 15 plugin slot cards, mini knob controls, S/M/B buttons, L/R/M/S routing selectors.

Phase 4.0 + 4.1.1 complete. Plugin scaffold with 63 APVTS params, PluginHostManager (VST3/AU format registration, async loading, KnownPluginList), PluginSlot (atomic pointer swap, dry/wet, bypass, state persistence), PluginEditorWindow, WebView editor with programmatic relays, production HTML. Builds VST3/AU/Standalone on macOS.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView selected for: (1) Rich spectrum visualization with draggable crossover handles, (2) FabFilter-inspired clean UI with animations, (3) Plugin browser/slot card UI complexity, (4) Easier iteration on visual design
